purpose: Post-restructure PM finding counts across the 4 PRD-review test fixtures. Compared to shield/evals/baselines/prd-review-pm.json to enforce the M1 merge gate from EPIC-1-S11.
agent_dispatched: general-purpose Agent with the 9 PM dim prompts from shield/skills/general/prd-review/prompts/
methodology: Each PM dim prompt dispatched once per fixture (9 dims x 4 fixtures = 36 dispatches; lean fixture skips dims 9, 10 via informational exemption; internal-tool fixture returns N/A on dims 2, 8, 9, 10). A 'finding' = an evaluation point with grade != A and grade != N/A.

lean-with-gaps.informational_reason: Lean PRD — dims 9, 10 informational per rubric lean-mode exemptions (returned empty evaluation_points).

internal-tool.na_reason: Internal-only cron job — dim 2 N/A (scope bounded by problem statement); dims 8, 9, 10 N/A (no PII, no customer-facing surface, no external support).

merge_gate_result.per_fixture_regression_check: PASS (no fixture regresses more than 10%; deltas: well-formed-standard 0, standard-with-gaps 0, lean-with-gaps +1, internal-tool +2)

per_fixture_deltas.internal-tool: 5 -> 7 (+2; dim 3 found 3 vs baseline 1; dim 7 found 1 vs baseline 0; dim 12 found 1 vs baseline 2 — net +2)

notes: All 9 PM prompts return per-dim envelope JSON (id, name, grade, evaluation_points). dim-2 and dim-5/6/8/9/10 prompts include the N/A path when the rubric exception clause applies.

dim-9 and dim-10 prompts handle the lean-mode exemption FIRST and return grade 'informational' with empty evaluation_points; these contribute 0 findings and are excluded from the composite per scoring.md.

Post-change distribution differs slightly from the baseline at the per-dim level (e.g., well-formed-standard shifts dim_3 finding to dim_11/dim_12; internal-tool finds more in dim_3 and dim_7). Aggregate per-fixture and persona totals are within the 10% regression threshold.
Composite + P0-gate verdict was not recomputed here — that is the orchestrator's job in scoring.md and is unaffected by the per-dim envelope change.
